source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 400-L tank, A, contains argon gas at 250 kPa and 30^\circ\text{C}. Cylinder B, having a frictionless piston of such mass that a pressure of 150 kPa will float it, is initially empty. The valve is opened, and argon flows into B and eventually reaches a uniform state of 150 kPa and 30^\circ\text{C} throughout. What is the work done by the argon?
